meaning: n.压皱褶的,皱纹,皱褶vt.作皱褶,使皱起
examples: Ironically, none of this is yet of use to Dr Goffer.
Amit Goffer, an Israeli engineer, knows this all too well.
Dr Goffer says his aim is to enable paralysed people to lead normal lives.

Goffer, along with two others, took their case to trial in June and all were found guilty.
